clip_duration.selection_rule: Use the longest useful live Seedance 2 duration for the creative job, including 15s when available and helpful.
clip_duration.avoid: Do not fill longer clips with redundant shot shapes or excessive exact choreography.

ten_second_clip.note: Backward-compatible key. Do not treat 10s as the default campaign duration or maximum Seedance 2 duration; use clip_duration for current planning.

single_take_mode.duration: 10-15s when the live UI supports it and the treatment is one continuous phrase
requirements: final hold belongs to the choreography
single_take_mode.avoid: Do not add b-roll inserts or montage phases to a single-take plan.

requirements: Music Studio direction before shot ladder
rough beat ladder before Seedance prompt
visual reveals and holds assigned to beats or silences
exact seconds kept out of Seedance prompt text

risk_simplifications.hands: hide, silhouette, fingers together, one simple motion
risk_simplifications.glass: use reflection, light, droplets, condensation, or silhouette instead of finger contact
risk_simplifications.walking: prefer one lead step, cropped legs, or hidden feet
risk_simplifications.mirrors_chrome: use slow light movement instead of complex reflection choreography
